sections.paragraph:
, יַחְדָּו, prop. those joined together, they together, like כֻּלֹּו-

(1) together, in one place, Gen 13:6 22:6 36:7 Deu 25:5.

(2) together at one time, Ps. 4:9 .

(3) with the addition of כֹּל all together, all at once, Psa 14:3 1Ch 10:6 also without כֹּל Job 24:17.

(4) i.q. mutually, with one another, e.g. נִצּוּ יַחְדָּו they strove together, Deu 25:11 comp. 1Sa 17:10.
